name: agentic-project-kit
description: Repository-first workflow CLI for AI-assisted software development.

scripts.build: node scripts/clean-dist.mjs && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && node scripts/copy-template-assets.mjs
scripts.test: tsx --test src/core/config/schema.test.ts src/core/init/init.test.ts src/core/templates/renderer.test.ts src/core/tasks/task.test.ts src/core/docs/adopt.test.ts src/core/docs/prompt.test.ts src/core/modes/mode.test.ts src/core/audit/audit.test.ts src/core/sync/sync.test.ts src/core/analytics/analytics.test.ts src/cli/cli.test.ts
